---
id: list-dns-intelligence-checks
title: "List available DNS Intelligence checks"
description: "Returns the camelCase identifiers of every check the worker registry advertises. Use one of these as `check` in `POST /dns-intelligence/run`."
sidebar_label: "List available DNS Intelligence checks"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: public-api/easydmarc-api
custom_edit_url: null
show_extensions: true
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List available DNS Intelligence checks"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/dns-lookup/dns-intelligence/checks"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns the camelCase identifiers of every check the worker registry advertises. Use one of these as `check` in `POST /dns-intelligence/run`.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

  parameters={[]}

  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>

  id={undefined}
